regions.content:
技术要求Technical requirements:
1、带★要求，为产品重要和关键特性
Requirements marked with ★ indicate important and
critical features of the product
2、引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损伤
The outgoing line cannot be disconnected, and the
insulation layer and wire core cannot be damaged
regions.content_en: Technical requirements: 1. Requirements marked with ★ are important and critical features of the product. 2. The outgoing wire must not be broken, and the insulation layer and conductor must not be damaged.
